statement: Every RealChronosAdmissiblePredicate is represented by at least one RegisteredChronosCarrier.
weakest_sufficient_role: upgrades selected-carrier coverage to unrestricted carrier coverage
removes the main domain gap before full Reg-SNF closure
does not prove Reg-SNF, UniversalFiberEntropyGap, DepthBridge, Chronos-RR, H4.1/FGL, P vs NP, or Clay closure
blocked_by: absence of an unrestricted representation theorem
boundary: Frontier statement only; no theorem-level closure asserted.
